name: Dorothy's Mostaccioli Vegetarian Pasta with W
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Basil leaves (sliced into fine ribbons)
Save the top centers for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta according to package directions.
2. In a large skillet or saucepan, heat olive oil and sherry pepper oil.
3. Add oregano, onions, and shallots; sauté until almost translucent.
4. Add garlic and walnuts; sauté without letting the garlic brown.
5. Stir in crushed tomatoes, Burgundy wine, and basil; cook slowly over low heat, uncovered.
6. In a microwave-safe dish, cook julienned red pepper for 1 minute.
7. Cook julienned zucchini for 2 to 3 minutes.
8. When the sauce has reduced to the desired consistency, add the cooked peppers and zucchini.
9. Drain pasta (spin in lettuce spinner to remove excess water).
10. Add pasta to the tomato sauce; toss well.
11. Taste and adjust seasoning with salt and crushed red pepper flakes as desired.
12. Transfer pasta mixture to an oven-safe dish; sprinkle shredded mozzarella cheese liberally on top.
13. Place under broiler until cheese melts; garnish with fresh basil leaves and stems.
